mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.resource, p.action

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.resource, p.action
SELECT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.resource, p.action
